title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Highlight of this week
Image reference: image-asset.jpeg | assets/2024-07-05_weekly-insights-review_img_image-asset_8b70bf1ad459.jpeg
A second Trump presidency will very likely also affect global geopolitics and ocean shipping sits in the forefront of any change in the current status quo. Read More
The VLCC Market Steadies Following a Month of Constant Pressure, as a Rare Positive Factor Emerges - The VLCC market remained relatively stable in the final week of June, following persistent downward pressure recorded earlier in the month. Read More
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-07-02 095559.png | assets/2024-07-05_weekly-insights-review_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_87b965fd3605.png
Image reference: image-asset (1).jpeg | assets/2024-07-05_weekly-insights-review_img_image-asset28129_30240bdd77d3.jpeg
Doric Weekly Market Insight
Baltic Panamax TC Index averaged $15,910 daily for the first half of the current trading year, marking the highest average in the last couple of years.
